title: YTP: Wanker of the Winds (ILVG-3)
description:
[Epilepsy / Sound Warning] Extended Version: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BzOzxWI4YIM
This is my entry to the SerialK86 and Dave-K collab, "I Love Videogames Collab - 3". Watch the full collab: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XL8oVCHuD7I. I edited a gameplay of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker since it was a favorite childhood video game, and because I was in the middle of a play-through. 

Software used:
*Sony Vegas 9.0 Pro
*Paint.NET
